Setup and Operation¶

Virtual environment¶

Create and activate a Windows virtual environment:

py -3 -m venv .venv
.\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1
python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
python manage.py migrate
python manage.py test
python manage.py runserver

Docker¶

Build and run the application:

docker build -t news-capstone .
docker run --rm -p 8000:8000 --env-file .env news-capstone

Secrets¶

Copy .env.example to .env and provide private values locally. Never commit passwords, secret keys, access tokens, private keys, databases, or virtual-environment folders.

News Application Consolidation
